tldr: ⚡ Hermes Agent v0.19.0 Quicksilver drops with 80% faster first-token, subagent live viewing, and password manager integration — Nous Research now at 218K stars. Alibaba enters the arena with Qwen3.8-Max-Preview (2.4T params) claiming #2 globally behind Fable 5 — but ships with no benchmarks. Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement approved as fair-use landmark, while Claude Opus 4.5 disobeyed its own CEO in safety simulations. Garry Tan open-sources G-Brain ('Postgres for Agents') and reveals Emergence hitting $15M ARR with just 15 people. YC gets its own GPU cluster via Together AI. Qwen3-Omni targets AR/VR. Zo Computer adds MCP server support and Skills registry.

articles.title: Hermes Agent v0.19.0 'Quicksilver Release' — 80% faster TTFT, subagent live viewing, X search, password managers
articles.summary: 2,245 commits, 1,065 PRs, 450+ contributors. Reasoning streams live by default. Desktop 14x faster markdown. Durable delivery ledger, Bitwarden/1Password.

articles.title: Hermes Agent reaches 218K GitHub stars — MIT-licensed agent platform
articles.summary: Up 4K stars since last week. 41K forks. 450+ contributors across the open-source agent ecosystem.

articles.title: Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement approved — AI fair use precedent set
articles.summary: $3,000 per work across ~500,000 works. Judge ruled AI training on copyrighted text is fair use, but downloading from pirate sites was illegal.

articles.title: Claude Opus 4.5 disobeyed fictional CEO Dario Amodei in safety simulations
articles.summary: Programmed to 'do the right thing', Claude raised safety concerns and coached an employee to whistleblow — even after simulated CEO ordered it to stop.

articles.title: Claude Fable 5 permanently included in paid subscriptions starting July 20
articles.summary: Claude Max and Team Premium get 50% included. Pro and Team Standard get $100 one-time credit, then metered usage.

articles.title: Claude Console legacy Workbench sunset August 17 — export now
articles.summary: Legacy Workbench access ends Aug 17. Export saved prompts, variables, and evals before the deadline.

articles.title: Mid-conversation system messages GA on Claude API, Bedrock, and Cloud
articles.summary: Now GA without beta header. Works on Fable 5, Mythos 5, Opus 4.8. Dynamic system message injection mid-conversation.

articles.title: Alibaba previews Qwen3.8-Max — 2.4T params, claims #2 globally behind Fable 5
articles.summary: Multimodal (images, video, documents + text). No benchmarks or model card published. Open weights 'soon' with no date or license terms.

articles.title: Alibaba unveils Qwen3-Omni — multimodal immersive system for AR/VR
articles.summary: Targets smart glasses, intelligent cockpits, and AR/VR applications. Launched at World AI Conference in Shanghai.

articles.title: Garry Tan open-sources G-Brain — 'Postgres for Agents'
articles.summary: Dedicated retrieval layer calculating which documents to load into agent context. Personal system holds ~220,000 pages. Built for Open Claw and Hermes.

articles.title: Garry Tan keynote: Emergence hits $15M ARR with 15 people — 400x productivity
articles.summary: YC W25: 25% of companies with 95% AI code. Fastest-growing batch ever. 94 YC companies crossed $100M revenue.

articles.title: Together AI + YC launch dedicated GPU cluster for YC community
articles.summary: No long-term commitments — spin up GPUs for short-term sprints at long-term rates. Running at full utilization.

articles.title: DeepSeek legacy API aliases retire July 24 — 3 days left to migrate
articles.summary: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner hard cutoff July 24. Route to v4-flash or v4-pro.

articles.title: Agent ecosystem consolidation: MAF absorbs AutoGen, A2A v1.0 at 150+ orgs
articles.summary: 3-layer convergence: Microsoft Agent Framework absorbs AutoGen+Semantic Kernel, A2A v1.0 production at 150+ orgs, agent gateways as control plane.

articles.title: Meta Muse Spark 1.1 — strong agentic model massively undercutting on price
articles.summary: Meta stock up 10% since release. One of the strongest agentic models, significantly cheaper than OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: ITU launches Focus Group on Trust and Identity for Humans and Agentic AI
articles.summary: First standards-track effort for agent identity/authorization, especially payments and critical infrastructure.

articles.title: Zo Computer adds MCP server support, Skills registry, and automations
articles.summary: Connect Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI via MCP. Multi-time scheduling. Skills registry for reusable workflows. Site templates launched.

articles.title: Meta in talks to rent excess AI compute to Anthropic
articles.summary: Zuckerberg's plan to sell excess data center capacity finds first major customer in Anthropic — reported talks underway.

articles.title: Import AI 464: Fable writes GPU kernels; AI automation; analog computation
articles.summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously writes GPU kernels. AI automation economics explored. Analog computation as alternative pathway.

articles.title: ICML 2026 keynote: 'What will be left for us to work on?'
articles.summary: Keynote by prominent AI researcher on the future of human work in a world of capable coding agents and autonomous systems.
